evals.prompt: specs/ 폴더의 테스트 플랜을 기반으로 Playwright 테스트 코드를 생성해줘
evals.expected_output: generator_setup_page로 브라우저 초기화, 실시간 step 실행, generator_read_log로 로그 확인, generator_write_test로 .spec.ts 생성
expectations: Uses generator_setup_page to initialize the browser before any interaction
Executes each test step live in the browser (click, type, navigate) before generating code
Calls generator_read_log to retrieve the recorded execution log
Calls generator_write_test to produce .spec.ts output files
Generated test code uses describe/test block structure with meaningful test names
Each action in the generated code has a step comment explaining what it does
Generated code includes // spec: and // seed: comments at the top referencing source files

evals.prompt: 회원가입 폼 테스트를 생성해줘. 유효성 검증 실패 케이스도 포함해
evals.expected_output: 폼 입력 → 제출 → 성공/실패 검증, 빈 필드/잘못된 이메일 등 에지케이스 포함
expectations: Uses generator_setup_page to initialize browser and navigate to the signup form
Generates separate test cases for valid submission and at least 2 validation failure scenarios
Validation failure scenarios include empty required fields and invalid email format
Each test fills form fields using browser_type or browser_fill_form before submitting
Calls generator_write_test to produce .spec.ts files
Generated code uses getByRole, getByLabel, or getByText selectors instead of raw CSS selectors
Generated code includes assertions (expect) to verify success/error messages after form submission

evals.prompt: specs/에 있는 플랜 중에서 검색/필터 기능 테스트만 코드로 만들어줘. 결과가 없을 때도 확인해야 해
evals.expected_output: 검색 입력 → 결과 필터링 검증, 결과 없음 UI 확인, getByRole/getByText 기반 resilient selector 사용
expectations: Uses generator_setup_page to initialize the browser
Executes search input and result verification steps live in the browser
Generates a test case that verifies search results appear for a valid query
Generates a separate test case for no-results scenario with empty state UI verification
Uses resilient selectors (getByRole, getByText, getByLabel) instead of raw CSS selectors
Calls generator_write_test to produce .spec.ts output
Generated code does not use deprecated networkidle wait strategy

evals.prompt: 로그인하고 대시보드로 이동한 다음 프로필 수정하는 흐름을 테스트로 만들어줘. specs/에 플랜 있어
evals.expected_output: 다중 페이지 네비게이션 포함: 로그인 페이지 → 대시보드 → 프로필 편집. 각 페이지 전환 시 URL/콘텐츠 검증
expectations: Uses generator_setup_page to initialize the browser
Executes multi-page navigation steps live in the browser (login → dashboard → profile)
Generated code includes URL verification after each page navigation (expect page to have URL)
Generated code waits for page content to be visible before interacting after navigation
Calls generator_write_test to produce .spec.ts output
Generated test has a logical flow that follows the user journey end-to-end

evals.prompt: I need to generate Playwright tests from specs/ folder. The dashboard fetches notifications from /api/notifications - make sure to cover the async data loading scenario where content appears after API response
evals.expected_output: API 응답 대기가 필요한 비동기 데이터 로딩 시나리오. 로딩 상태 확인 후 데이터 표시 검증 포함
expectations: Uses generator_setup_page to initialize the browser
Executes steps live in the browser including waiting for data to load
Generated code handles async data loading with proper waits (waitFor, toBeVisible, or expect with timeout)
Generated code does not use networkidle or hard-coded sleep/timeout values
Calls generator_write_test to produce .spec.ts output
Generated code includes assertions that verify the loaded data is displayed correctly

evals.prompt: 에러 페이지랑 빈 상태 UI 테스트도 만들어줘. 서버 에러 나면 에러 메시지 뜨는지, 데이터 없으면 빈 화면 잘 보이는지
evals.expected_output: 에러 상태와 빈 상태 UI 검증 테스트. 에러 메시지 표시, empty state 일러스트/텍스트 확인
expectations: Uses generator_setup_page to initialize the browser
Generates test case(s) for error state UI verification (error message visibility)
Generates test case(s) for empty state UI verification (no data placeholder)
Each scenario executes steps live in the browser before generating code
Generated code uses assertions to verify error/empty state text or visual elements
Calls generator_write_test to produce .spec.ts output
